response:
Yes. Planhat has a **native Salesforce integration** that supports syncing and enriching deals, contacts, accounts, and other objects between the two systems.[4][6]

Planhat says the integration is **bidirectional**: you can bring Salesforce data into Planhat and also push data from Planhat back to Salesforce.[1][4] It also supports automatic syncing, with Salesforce-to-Planhat updates running on a schedule and Planhat-to-Salesforce updates occurring in near real time.[2][4]

If you want, I can also explain **what data objects can be synced** or **how to set up the integration**.[1][3][4]
